title: terebinthus lancifolia
intro: Terebinthus lancifolia, also known as the Chinese treebinth or lancifolia treebinth, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its resin, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Terebinthus lancifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat rheumatism, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In traditional herbal preparations, Terebinthus lancifolia resin is often used to make ointments, tinctures, and infusions that are applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
